I am offering one unit of X for 60 ZUP.

<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 60</newly proposed trade>

messages.text:
OFFER: price=50
I can do 50 ZUP for 1 unit of X.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count> 1 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The seller’s offer of 60 is below my maximum value of 100, so a deal is possible. To improve my outcome, I should counter with a lower price while staying realistic. I will propose 50 as a reasonable midpoint and keep the negotiation open. </reason>
<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 50</newly proposed trade>
